aboutPage.heroTitle: Your trusted partner in Dubai real estate
aboutPage.heroSubtitle: MULKEEF Real Estate LLC is a RERA-licensed brokerage in Dubai, UAE. We deliver buy, rent, off-plan, and property management services with an editorial, client-first approach — from first brief to handover.
aboutPage.storyP1: MULKEEF Real Estate LLC was founded to make Dubai’s property market clearer and more human. Led by Pierre Adam and supported by Noman Mirza, our team pairs disciplined process with neighbourhood-level insight for buyers, renters, and investors.
aboutPage.storyP2: We combine deep community knowledge with transparent advice — every recommendation is grounded in regulation, data, and your personal goals.
aboutPage.storyP3: Our focus stays simple: exceptional outcomes with integrity, speed, and long-term trust. Buy, rent, off-plan, and property management — all under one Dubai-based team.
aboutPage.valueTrustDesc: Every transaction is handled with complete transparency. No hidden fees, no surprises — honest, professional service backed by RERA licensing.
aboutPage.valueClientDesc: Your goals drive everything we do. We listen, understand your needs, and deliver tailored solutions for your lifestyle and investment objectives.
aboutPage.valueExpertDesc: Deep knowledge of Dubai’s communities, trends, and opportunities. Our agents specialise in specific neighbourhoods for unmatched local insight.
aboutPage.valueInnovDesc: We use modern tools to streamline your journey — virtual tours, digital workflows, and seamless communication from first enquiry to handover.
aboutPage.reraBannerBody: MULKEEF Real Estate LLC is fully licensed and regulated by the Real Estate Regulatory Agency (RERA) of Dubai. All our agents hold valid RERA broker cards and complete annual recertification to stay aligned with the latest regulations.
